spec_match.rationale: Perfect representation of TransformStream out-of-order processing. Correctly schedules concurrent independent promises, letting chunk 5 transform and print before chunk 4 completes.

interactive.rationale: Features beautiful pipeline diagrams, a live interactive grid of chunk transition states, a dynamic output terminal, and active performance timers.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Exactly aligns with the pipeline transform blurb introduced in index.html.

edge_cases.rationale: Avoids sequential execution race states by utilizing independent Promise callbacks and properly cleans active timeout hooks.

references.rationale: The page lists three relative concept references but fails to cite the mandatory ChromeStatus external tracking link.

design_system.rationale: Clean and cohesive presentation. Selects distinct system colors, neat grid cell margins, and a beautiful dark console output box.

openQuestions.title: Cite ChromeStatus entry in references
openQuestions.detail: Add the canonical link to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5111042975465472 in the see also reference links list at the bottom of the page.
